name: Five Cup Slice
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the raisins, semisweet chocolate chips, peanuts, and coconut in a bowl.
2. Add the sweetened condensed milk to the bowl and stir until well mixed.
3. Grease a 9 X 9-inch pan.
4. Pour the mixture into the prepared pan.
5. Bake at 350°F for 25 to 30 minutes.
6. Allow to cool before cutting into squares.
